title: Wisp Optimised
description: A simple optimized minecraft modpack with beautiful graphics and smooth gameplay.
body:
# Wisp Optimized ## About This modpack is built to **_enhance your gameplay experience_** while providing the best possible performance for your worlds. It includes **_quality-of-life_** mods such as Sodium and Litematica to improve performance, streamline gameplay, and assist with building. ## List of Mods
Included mods
    • Balm by BlayTheNinth
    • BetterF3 by cominixo, TreyRuffy
    • Boat Item View by 50ap5ud5
    • Capes by Cael
    • Cherished Worlds by Illusive Soulworks
    • Cloth Config v26.1 by shedaniel
    • Clumps by Jaredlll08
    • CraftCalc by ArrozNaTwitch
    • Day Counter (Original) for 1.16 - Latest! by justwilly
    • Dynamic FPS by juliand665, LostLuma
    • EntityCulling by tr7zw
    • Fabric API by FabricMC
    • Fabric Language Kotlin by FabricMC
    • Falling Leaves by Fourmisain, BrekiTomasson, RandomMcSomethin
    • FerriteCore by malte0811
    • ImmediatelyFast by RK_01
    • Iris by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
    • Lighty by andi_makes
    • Litematica by masa
    • Litematica Printer by aleksilassila
    • Lithium by JellySquid, 2No2Name
    • MaLiLib by masa
    • Mod Menu by Prospector, haykam821, gniftygnome, TerraformersMC
    • More Culling by FX - PR0CESS, 1Foxy2
    • Mouse Tweaks by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR)
    • No Chat Reports by Aizistral
    • NoFog
    • Placeholder API by Patbox
    • Reese's Sodium Options by FlashyReese
    • Shulker Box Tooltip by MisterPeModder
    • Sodium by JellySquid (jellysquid3)
    • Sodium Extra by FlashyReese
    • Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks by Rynnavinx
    • ViaFabricPlus by Florian Reuth (EnZaXD), RK_01
    • Xaero's World Map by xaero96
    • YetAnotherConfigLib by isXander
    • Zoomify by isXander
---
Other notes... The versions format is -x.y(.z), where - the x is the mod list revision (increase when adding or removing mods) - the y is the configuration revision (increase when config settings are added or changed) - the z increases every time a mod is updated or for minor adjustments, this value can be 0 at the first release MC version. x.y.z is reset to 1.0 for every new MC release.
This modpack is a continuation of Airy Optimized.
